firstSection.joinPlatform: Coupons, stamp cards, points and rewards — all in one app.
firstSection.figuresAlt: Bonapka app home screen with store map and promoted coupons

secondSection.loyaltyPointsAndVouchers: Discount coupons, stamp cards, visit streaks, loyalty points and vouchers — a complete loyalty platform for your business.
secondSection.loyaltyCardsAlt: Discount coupon, coffee reward card and cafe location card in the Bonapka app

thirdSection.step1Content: Download BonApka Merchant, set up your company profile and add your points of sale
thirdSection.step2Content: Create coupons, stamp cards, points programs and visit streaks — tailored to your business
thirdSection.step3Content: Customers show their QR code in the Bonapka app, and you automatically assign points, stamps or redeem coupons
thirdSection.step4Content: Analyze customer activity, compare stores, track trends and send push notifications
thirdSection.merchantPromoAriaLabel: BonApka Merchant — register your business in 10 minutes
thirdSection.merchantRegisterPhoneAlt: Company profile registration screen in the BonApka Merchant app
thirdSection.merchantLoyaltyPhoneAlt: Loyalty program setup screen in the BonApka Merchant app

fourthSection.seeWhatYouCanDo: See what you can do in one app
fourthSection.scanQRAddPointsBuildLoyalty: Scan QR, add points, build loyalty
fourthSection.scanQRDescription: Your customers show their QR code in the Bonapka app, and you assign points, stamps or redeem coupons with a single scan. Fast, convenient, no paper cards.
fourthSection.sellVouchersAsGifts: Coupons and discounts for your customers
fourthSection.vouchersDescription: Create discount coupons, multi-buy promotions, day-of-week offers and more. Customers activate coupons in the app and redeem them at your place — no codes, no paper.
fourthSection.gamificationDescription: Stamp cards with milestones and rewards for regular visits (streaks) motivate customers to return more often. More visits, greater loyalty!
fourthSection.qrScanningAlt: Customer QR code screen in the Bonapka app
fourthSection.couponsAndRewardsAlt: Promotions, coupons and rewards screen in the Bonapka app
fourthSection.stampCardAlt: Stamp card screen in the Bonapka app

fifthSection.historyDescription: Review transaction history, check earned points, stamps, redeemed coupons and vouchers — all in one place. Full control over your loyalty programs!
fifthSection.activityHistoryMockupAlt: BonApka Enterprise statistics dashboard on a laptop and phone

sixthSection.dataSafeContent: Full control and security — manage points, coupons and customer data worry-free.
sixthSection.smartLoyaltyContent: Track points, stamps and visit streaks. Analyze data and optimize reward programs in one place.
sixthSection.manageAllContent: The merchant panel gives you access to coupons, stamps, points, rewards and statistics — from one app.
sixthSection.buildRelationsContent: Customers refer your venue to friends for points. Send push notifications about new promotions and rewards.
sixthSection.support24Content: Customers easily find your venue on the interactive map in the Bonapka app — with filters, categories and search.
sixthSection.customerManagementContent: Invite collaborators and assign granular permissions — full merchant access or specific point of sale only.
sixthSection.autoTrackingContent: Every QR scan, stamp, point and coupon is recorded in the system with full history and audit trail.
sixthSection.increaseRevenueContent: Customers earn points for purchases and exchange them for vouchers and rewards — a new way to build loyalty.

seventhSection.qrCodeText: Your unique QR code in the Bonapka app — show it at checkout to collect points, stamps and redeem coupons. Everything automatic, no paper cards.
seventhSection.stampCardRewardAlt: Stamp card in the Bonapka app
seventhSection.merchantPointsAlt: Merchant points balance in the Bonapka app

eighthSection.focusOnBusiness: Focus on your business — we'll handle the rest
eighthSection.automateEverything: Automatic point, stamp and visit streak allocation. Coupon and reward management — all in one place so you can focus on growing your business.
eighthSection.simpleSolutionContent: Bonapka for your customers. BonApka Merchant for your business. Together they form a complete loyalty platform.
eighthSection.loyaltyPlatformContent: Coupons, stamps, streaks, points, rewards, referrals and statistics — everything you need in one place.
eighthSection.saveTimeContent: Set up loyalty programs in minutes. Manage multiple points of sale from one panel.
eighthSection.baristaPhotoAlt: Barista preparing coffee in a cafe

ninthSection.comment1: Thanks to Bonapka, my customers return more often! They collect points and stamps for bike repairs and redeem them for free check-ups. Simple and effective!
ninthSection.comment2: I used to hand out paper loyalty cards that customers kept losing. Now everything's digital in Bonapka — more returning customers and more traffic in my café!
ninthSection.comment3: The app lets me reward loyal customers with coupons and vouchers. Discount coupons and stamp cards attract new customers, and visit streaks retain regulars.

tenthSection.applyAndUse: Download BonApka Merchant, set up your business and start building customer loyalty — first 30 days free.
tenthSection.appLoginMockupAlt: Bonapka app mockup — login and sign-up screen on a phone
